content:
Character: Jamal Osei
Perception: Jamal's a good-looking guy in an understated way — clean-cut, composed, always looks like he has somewhere important to be. He's impressively smart; the fact that he's at NYU Law while working behind a coffee counter says everything about his work ethic. He's steady, principled, genuinely kind without being soft. He's my friend — the person I see first every morning, which counts for something. I think he sees me as a friend too, maybe someone he quietly worries about. He makes the best pour-over in Manhattan. I've never told him about Katie but I suspect he knows. He notices everything.
